description:
## [1.0.1](https://github.com/RookieEnough/De-ReVanced/compare/v1.0.0...v1.0.1) (2026-03-06)


### Bug Fixes

* Fixed Google Photos crashes on settings screens ([58f8bc8](https://github.com/RookieEnough/De-ReVanced/commit/58f8bc80dfd601cfe5a5dfee81e64d78bab0f496))


### Features

* Added Messenger patches — disable typing indicator, hide inbox ads, hide inbox subtabs, hide Facebook button, remove Meta AI ([901b2ec](https://github.com/RookieEnough/De-ReVanced/commit/901b2ec28fb8e5863d2085d471f0cf529de08422))
* Added Inshorts patches — hide ads ([901b2ec](https://github.com/RookieEnough/De-ReVanced/commit/901b2ec28fb8e5863d2085d471f0cf529de08422))
* Added Amazon Shopping patches — always allow deep-linking ([901b2ec](https://github.com/RookieEnough/De-ReVanced/commit/901b2ec28fb8e5863d2085d471f0cf529de08422))
